sources.label: geoBoundaries
sources.citation: Runfola D et al. (2020) geoBoundaries: A global database of political administrative boundaries. PLOS ONE.
sources.notes: ADM0 + ADM1 for USA (ISO3=USA) and India (ISO3=IND). Free, no key required.

sources.label: USPVDB — U.S. Large-Scale Solar Photovoltaic Database
sources.citation: Sydny Fujita et al. (2023) U.S. Large-Scale Solar Photovoltaic Database (USPVDB). U.S. Geological Survey data release.
sources.notes: GeoPackage with plant-level polygons and attributes for all utility-scale PV ≥1 MW.

sources.label: EIA Form 860 — Annual Electric Generator Report
sources.citation: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA). Form EIA-860. Annual Electric Generator Report.
sources.notes: Generator-level attributes: capacity, fuel type, status, county. Annual zip archive.

sources.label: EIA Form 923 — Power Plant Operations Report
sources.citation: U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA). Form EIA-923. Power Plant Operations Report.
sources.notes: Monthly and annual generation by plant and prime mover. Annual zip archive.

sources.label: NREL NSRDB — National Solar Radiation Database
sources.citation: Sengupta M et al. (2018) The National Solar Radiation Data Base (NSRDB). Renewable and Sustainable Energy Reviews.
sources.notes: PSM3 TMY data. Requires free API key from developer.nrel.gov/signup.

sources.label: Global Solar Atlas — World Bank / Solargis
sources.citation: World Bank / Solargis (2020) Global Solar Atlas 2.0. The World Bank Group.
sources.notes: Download GHI, PVOUT, DNI GeoTIFF rasters manually from https://globalsolaratlas.info/download. Select World → GHI, PVOUT, DNI → download. No API for bulk GeoTIFF.

sources.label: PVGIS — Photovoltaic Geographical Information System
sources.citation: Huld T et al. (2012) A new solar radiation database for estimating PV performance in Europe and Africa. Solar Energy.
sources.notes: Point-level API. No key required. Called per-candidate during scoring.

sources.label: NASA POWER — Prediction Of Worldwide Energy Resources
sources.citation: Stackhouse PW et al. (2018) 18-Year Wind Energy Hindcast Study. NASA Technical Report.
sources.notes: Climatology API for temperature, humidity, cloud fraction, irradiance. No key required.

sources.label: ESA WorldCover 2021 — 10m Global Land Cover
sources.citation: Zanaga D et al. (2022) ESA WorldCover 10m 2021 v200. Zenodo.
sources.notes: 10m resolution COG GeoTIFF tiles. Direct S3 download from esa-worldcover.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com. Download region tiles only when DOWNLOAD_WORLD_COVER=true.

sources.label: Copernicus DEM GLO-30
sources.license: DLR/ESA — Attribution required. Free for scientific and commercial use.
sources.citation: European Space Agency / Airbus (2022). Copernicus DEM GLO-30. ESA.
sources.notes: Register at Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem (https://dataspace.copernicus.eu) or download via OpenTopography API. Also available via AWS s3://copernicus-dem-30m/ (requester-pays). See MANUAL_DOWNLOAD_REQUIRED.md.

sources.label: HIFLD Electric Power Transmission Lines
sources.citation: Homeland Infrastructure Foundation-Level Data (HIFLD). Electric Power Transmission Lines. DHS/CISA.
sources.notes: GeoJSON via ArcGIS REST API. Full USA transmission network including voltage class.

sources.label: OpenStreetMap Power Infrastructure + Roads (Overpass API)
sources.citation: OpenStreetMap contributors (2024). OpenStreetMap data.
sources.notes: Power lines, substations, roads queried per-region. Polite rate limiting applied.

sources.label: NITI Aayog / ISRO SAC Geospatial Energy Map of India
sources.license: Restricted — Government of India. Not open bulk download.
sources.citation: NITI Aayog / ISRO SAC (2022). Geospatial Energy Map of India.
sources.notes: Portal requires government registration. Do not scrape. Record as reference/unavailable. Use WRI GPPD + OSM as proxy for India grid/plant data.

sources.label: AI Dataset for Solar Energy Locations in India
sources.citation: Ortiz A et al. (2022) A machine learning dataset for solar energy locations in India. Scientific Data 9, 390.
sources.notes: Validated India solar farm polygon dataset. Download via Zenodo API.

sources.label: Global Renewables Watch — Microsoft Research
sources.citation: Hanna J et al. (2025) Global Renewables Watch: A Temporal Dataset of Solar and Wind Energy Derived from Satellite Imagery. arXiv:2503.14860.
sources.notes: Download GeoParquet from GitHub release assets.

sources.label: Global Photovoltaic Power Generating Units Inventory (Kruitwagen et al.)
sources.citation: Kruitwagen L et al. (2021) A global inventory of photovoltaic solar energy generating units. Nature 598, 604–610.
sources.notes: Global utility-scale PV polygon inventory. Download from Zenodo.

sources.label: JRC Global Surface Water Explorer
sources.license: Free for all non-commercial purposes. Attribution required.
sources.citation: Pekel JF et al. (2016) High-resolution mapping of global surface water and its long-term changes. Nature 540, 418–422.
sources.notes: Monthly water occurrence GeoTIFF tiles available from JRC FTP. Download occurrence and seasonality bands.

sources.label: HydroLAKES — Global Lake and Reservoir Polygons
sources.citation: Messager ML et al. (2016) Estimating the volume and age of water stored in global lakes using a geo-statistical approach. Nature Communications 7, 13603.
sources.notes: Download requires form at https://www.hydrosheds.org/page/hydrolakes → 'Download HydroLAKES'. See MANUAL_DOWNLOAD_REQUIRED.md.

sources.label: GRanD — Global Reservoir and Dam Database v1.3
sources.license: Attribution required. Free for non-commercial research.
sources.citation: Lehner B et al. (2011) High-resolution mapping of the world's reservoirs and dams for sustainable river-flow management. Frontiers in Ecology and the Environment.
sources.notes: Download from NASA Earthdata (requires free Earthdata login). Shapefile of 7,320 large dams globally. See MANUAL_DOWNLOAD_REQUIRED.md.

sources.label: GEBCO 2024 Grid
sources.citation: GEBCO Compilation Group (2024) GEBCO 2024 Grid. doi:10.5285/1c44ce99-0a0d-5f4f-e063-7086abc0ea0f.
sources.notes: 15 arc-second global bathymetry. Direct download from GEBCO; large file (~7 GB). Only when DOWNLOAD_GEBCO=true.

sources.label: Copernicus Marine Global Ocean Waves Analysis and Forecast
sources.citation: Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service (2024). GLOBAL_ANALYSISFORECAST_WAV_001_027.
sources.notes: Requires free Copernicus Marine account. Use copernicusmarine CLI: `copernicusmarine get -i cmems_mod_glo_wav_anfc_0.083deg_PT3H-i`. Only when DOWNLOAD_COPERNICUS_MARINE=true. See MANUAL_DOWNLOAD_REQUIRED.md.

sources.label: WRI Global Power Plant Database
sources.citation: Byers L et al. (2019) A Global Database of Power Plants. World Resources Institute, Washington, DC.
sources.notes: CSV of ~35,000 power plants globally. Direct download.
